page_content:
FREN303 Translation: English to French (3 Credits)

Practicum in translation primarily from English to French; contrastive analysis.

Prerequisite: FREN301; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

FREN306 Commercial French | (3 Credits)

Introduction to commercial French including correspondence and business terminology. Emphasis on cross-cultural concepts needed for successful interaction within business settings. Taught in French. Prerequisite: FREN301; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
